description.value:
You treat a well-planned assassination with the diligence that you would bring to any investigation. You can Pursue a Lead and open an investigation regarding a target you want to assassinate. This investigation doesn't count against the number of active investigations you can have at a time, but you can only have one assassination investigation.

Your Skill Stratagem bonus increases by 1 when investigating details about your assassination target.

value.value: member of the Red Mantis assassins
